home.title: Build, share, and learn together.
home.lede: CampusForge connects students through open-source projects, shared resources, and collaborative courses. Request an invitation to join.
home.joinDesc: Submit your invitation request and start exploring resources, courses, and governance documents.
home.resourcesDesc: Guides, templates, tools, and internal documents shared by community members.
home.coursesDesc: Self-paced paths, workshops, onboarding programs, and active cohorts.
home.policiesDesc: Code of conduct, invitation rules, resource sharing policies, and security guidelines.

apply.title: Request Invitation
apply.subtitle: Submit your application to join the CampusForge community. An admin will review your request.
apply.reason: Why do you want to join?
apply.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us about your interests and what you hope to contribute...
apply.whatNextDesc: After you submit your application, an admin will review your request. You can check the status at any time.
apply.eligibilityDesc: You need a valid school email address and a student ID. Applications are reviewed based on community guidelines.

status.title: Application Status
status.subtitle: Track the progress of your community invitation application.
status.stepVerifyingDesc: School email and student ID are being verified.
status.stepReviewDesc: An admin is reviewing your application.
status.stepDecisionDesc: You will be notified of the final decision.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Guides, templates, tools, and documents shared by the community.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Learning paths, workshops, and active cohorts to help you grow.

policies.title: Policies & Governance
policies.subtitle: Community rules, guidelines, and governance documents.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage applications, members, and community resources.
